ddls:
CREATE TABLE "footwear_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each footwear type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the footwear type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the footwear type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the footwear type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the footwear type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the region is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the footwear type */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "size_value" REAL /* Size value (e.g., 39, 6, 24) */,
  "foot_length_cm" REAL /* Foot length in centimeters */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if this is the default size chart for the type and region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES footwear_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the brand is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the style */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the style is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the footwear type */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "size_value" REAL /* Size value (e.g., 39, 6, 24) */,
  "equivalent_size" REAL /* Equivalent size in the target region */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if this is the default conversion for the type and region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES footwear_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style */,
  "size_value" REAL /* Size value (e.g., 39, 6, 24) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the inventory is stored */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the inventory entry is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style */,
  "size_value" REAL /* Size value (e.g., 39, 6, 24) */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sale occurred */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sale entry is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the customer account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "order_total" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the order is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style */,
  "size_value" REAL /* Size value (e.g., 39, 6, 24) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the order item is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user role is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
